name: Hearst Audience & Subscription Model - BPA Ruleset
description: Best Practice Analyzer rules for sm_hearst_audience Direct Lake semantic model. Enforces measure format strings, relationship validity, naming conventions, hidden foreign keys, and no unnecessary calculated columns.

rules.name: Measures must have formatString
rules.description: All measures must declare an explicit formatString to ensure consistent rendering in reports.

rules.name: Avoid calculated columns for simple aggregations
rules.description: Calculated columns consume storage and refresh time. If a measure can compute the same result (e.g., SUM, COUNT), prefer the measure.

rules.name: All relationships must be active and have valid cardinality
rules.description: Relationships must be active (not inactive without reason) and declare correct cardinality (one-to-many, many-to-one).

rules.name: Foreign key columns must end with '_key'
rules.description: Dimension surrogate keys (foreign keys in fact tables) must follow the naming pattern *_key for clarity.

rules.name: Inactive relationships must be intentional
rules.description: If a relationship is inactive, the model must document why (e.g., role-playing dimension). Inactive relationships without a clear role create ambiguity.

rules.name: Foreign key columns should be hidden
rules.description: Surrogate key columns (e.g., date_key, brand_key) used for relationships should be hidden from the user report view; users interact with dimension attributes (e.g., brand_name) instead.

rules.name: Dimension tables must have a primary key column marked
rules.description: Each dimension table (dim_*) must have exactly one column marked as IsKey for referential integrity.

rules.name: Measures should belong to fact tables or a dedicated Measures table
rules.description: Measures defined on dimension tables can confuse users. Place measures in fact tables or a dedicated 'Measures' table.

rules.name: Tables must use Direct Lake partition mode
rules.description: This is a Direct Lake model; all partitions must declare mode: directLake (not import or directQuery).

rules.name: Direct Lake partitions must reference the lakehouse SQL endpoint
rules.description: All partitions must set expressionSource to 'DirectLake-lh_hearst_gold' (the lakehouse SQL endpoint binding).

rules.name: Measure base columns should have summarizeBy set appropriately
rules.description: Columns that are summed in measures (e.g., page_views, mrr) should declare summarizeBy: sum; key columns should declare summarizeBy: none.
